description: Complete backup of all working CITY_REGISTRY and BULK_SOURCES configs

new_york.name: New York City

chicago.name: Chicago
chicago.notes: V19: Fixed broken field map — old config had contact_1_type as contractor name and contact_1_state as status. Now maps all 3 contacts (name+type), all fee breakdowns (paid/unpaid/waived), permit_status, permit_milestone, work_type, ward, community_area, lat/lon. SUPERB data with 50+ fields. Verified Mar 2026.

los_angeles.name: Los Angeles
los_angeles.description: Building and Safety - Building Permits Issued from 2020 to Present (data.lacity.org)
los_angeles.notes: V19: Full 27-field map — zone, APC, CPA, neighborhood council (CNC), census tract, council district, APN, use code/desc, lat/lon, EV charger flag, solar flag, work description, valuation, status/status_date. Data through Mar 22, 2026. Verified.

seattle.name: Seattle

new_orleans.name: New Orleans
new_orleans.notes: V19: Full 35-field map — owner name, applicant, construction value, total/unpaid fees, bond amount, beds/baths, building area, second floor/basement, land use, zoning, council district, subdivision, parcel PIN, inspections, days open/issued, open comments. Same-day data Mar 24, 2026. GOLD.

Rich data: PERMIT_APPLICANT, OWNER_NAME, FEES_PAID, DESC_OF_WORK, WARD, ANC, ZONING, NEIGHBORHOODCLUSTER, lat/lon. Also available: yearly layers (2015-2025) at FeatureServer/15-17,24-25. Verified Mar 2026 with same-day permit data.
